zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Biset於大約1237年出生時，她的父親John de Biset53歲，母親Alice Basset of Headington60歲。她於1249年10月與Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel在英國史洛普爾斯托達結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1278年在英國奧可福爾胡可 諾頓享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾胡可 諾頓聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Biset于大约1237年出生时，她的父亲John de Biset53岁，母亲Alice Basset of Headington60岁。她于1249年10月与Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel在英国史洛普爾斯托達结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1278年在英国奧可福爾胡可 諾頓享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾胡可 諾頓聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

variants.name: Binette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Cecile, Normand, Raoul, Alain, Alphe, Donat, Fernand, Francois, Gedeon, Gilles.
Altered form of French Binet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: René Binet from Saint-Jean-de-Sauves in Vienne, France, married Catherine Bourgeois in Quebec City, QC, in 1667.

variants.name: Robinet
meanings: French: from a pet form of the personal name   Robin  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Biset was born about 1237, her father, John de Biset, was 53 and her mother, Alice Basset of Headington, was 60. She married Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel in October 1249, in Stottesdon, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1278, in Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Biset est née environ 1237, son père, John de Biset, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Alice Basset of Headington, avait 60 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel en octobre 1249, à Stottesdon, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1278, à Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à St Peter's Church, Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Biset um 1237 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Biset 53 und ihre Mutter Alice Basset of Headington 60. Sie hat im Oktober 1249 in Stottesdon, Shropshire, England Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1278 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in St Peter's Church, Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Biset è nata il circa 1237, sua padre, John de Biset, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Alice Basset of Headington, aveva 60 anni. Lei sposato Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel nel ottobre 1249, nel Stottesdon, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1278, nel Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a St Peter's Church, Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Bisetが約1237年に生まれた時，父John de Bisetは53歳，母Alice Basset of Headingtonは60歳であった。1249年10月にイギリスシュロプシュアイアストッテスドンでHugh du Plessis Baron of Arundelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1278年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアホーオク ノートンで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアホーオク ノートンスト ペテル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Peters Church, Hook Norton, Cherwe: 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 훅 노르턴 스트 피터'스 처르치
ko.St Peters Church, Hook Norton, Oxfordshi: 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 훅 노르턴 스트 피터'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Biset(이)가 대략 1237년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Biset(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Basset of Headington(은)는 60세였다. 그녀는 1249년 10월 영국 슈럽실르 스토츠던에서 Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1278년 영국 스퍼드실르 훅 노르턴에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 훅 노르턴 스트 피터'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Biset nasceu aproximadamente 1237, seu pai, John de Biset, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Alice Basset of Headington, tinha 60 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel em outubro de 1249, em Stottesdon, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1278, em Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em St Peter's Church, Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Biset родилась около 1237 г., её отцу по имени John de Biset было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Basset of Headington, 60. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel октябрь 1249 г. в местности стоттесдон, шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1278 г. в местности хук нортон, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности ст питир'с чурч, хук нортон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Biset nació aproximadamente 1237, su papá, John de Biset, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Alice Basset of Headington, tenía 60 años. Se casó con Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel en octubre de 1249, en Stottesdon, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1278, en Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en St Peter's Church, Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
